Setting.Name: Daemon::SchedulerCronTaskManager::Task###TiqoraSync
Setting.Description:
Polls the tiqora_cache_invalidation hand-off table written by Tiqora (the parallel Python/FastAPI reimplementation of Znuny) and clears the Znuny ticket cache for every ticket Tiqora wrote directly to the database, bypassing Znuny's Perl object layer.
Note on scheduling granularity: Znuny's daemon cron task manager only supports standard 5-field cron expressions (minute resolution), there is no 6-field/seconds syntax available. A 30 second interval as originally targeted is therefore not expressible; this task runs every minute ("* * * * *"), which is the finest granularity the scheduler supports. Effective worst-case staleness of Tiqora-written tickets in the Znuny UI is therefore up to ~60 seconds, not 30 seconds. This is considered fully acceptable for this use case.
